# Voice of MG v2 — Complete Redesign Implementation Plan

> **For Claude:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task.

**Goal:** Transform the static HTML proposal into an immersive, dark-themed, scroll-driven experience with interactive budget configurator, animated map, navigable moderator gallery, and functional dashboard mockup.

**Architecture:** Single-file HTML generated by `python3 build.py`, pure CSS+JS (no frameworks). Scroll-triggered animations via IntersectionObserver. Budget configurator with JS state management. Leaflet map with flyTo animations. All content inline — no external assets except Leaflet CDN.

**Tech Stack:** HTML5, CSS3 (custom properties, grid, animations), Vanilla JS, Leaflet.js, Python 3 build script.

---

## Phase 1: Dark Theme + Scroll-Reveal Foundation

> Convert from white-dominant to dark MG brand aesthetic. Replace modals with inline scroll-reveal content where possible.

### Task 1.1: Dark backgrounds + photo backgrounds

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/styles.css` (root variables, section backgrounds)

**Step 1:** Update CSS variables and section backgrounds
- Hero: dark gradient (aubergine→black) with subtle radial glow
- Contexto: `#0A0A0A` with warm overlay
- Campo: dark with subtle MG gradient
- Convocatoria: `#0C0C0C`
- Catering: dark charcoal `#111`
- Técnica: near-black
- Moderadores: aubergine `#28001E`
- Entregables: dark
- All text switches to white/warm-smoke `#F7F3EF`

**Step 2:** Run `python3 build.py` and verify with Playwright

**Step 3:** Commit `"feat: dark theme foundation per MG brand"`

### Task 1.2: Scroll-reveal animations (replace modals with inline content)

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/sections.html` (campo section — expand the 4 observation cards inline)
- Modify: `assets/styles.css` (scroll-reveal CSS)
- Modify: `build.py` (JS — enhanced IntersectionObserver)

**Step 1:** For Campo section: convert the 4 cards from `data-modal` click to **expandable inline content** that reveals on scroll. Each card shows the full solution text below it when it enters the viewport.

**Step 2:** Add CSS: `.reveal-content { max-height:0; overflow:hidden; transition: max-height 0.6s ease; }` + `.reveal-content.visible { max-height:500px; }`

**Step 3:** JS: IntersectionObserver adds `.visible` class as each card scrolls into view with staggered delays.

**Step 4:** Keep modals only for: venues (map click), moderadores (gallery), WAV Intelligence modules, superpoderes. Remove modals for: campo observations, convocatoria steps, entregables.

**Step 5:** Commit `"feat: scroll-reveal replaces modals for campo/convocatoria/entregables"`

### Task 1.3: More Heatwood script usage

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/sections.html`

**Step 1:** Add Heatwood to key emotional words throughout:
- Hero: "VOICE" in Heatwood
- Contexto: "Ya" already has it — add to "conocimiento"
- Campo: "Aprendimos" in Heatwood
- Dolor: "hemorragia" already has it — add to "María"
- Intelligence: "inteligencia" + "viva"
- Cierre: "empezar" already has it — add to "probó"

**Step 2:** Per brand rules: max 2 words, always in MG Red `#A00022`, always with Favorit

**Step 3:** Commit `"feat: expanded Heatwood script usage per brand guidelines"`

---

## Phase 2: Interactive Map

### Task 2.1: Map side panel + flyTo animation

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/sections.html` (map section layout)
- Modify: `assets/styles.css` (side panel CSS)
- Modify: `build.py` (JS — map flyTo logic)

**Step 1:** Add a side panel (`#map-sidebar`) to the left of the map:
```html
<div id="map-sidebar">
  <div class="map-venue-list">
    <div class="map-venue-item" data-venue="m-v1" data-lat="-33.4454" data-lng="-70.6256">
      <span class="map-venue-num">1</span>
      <span class="map-venue-name">Galpón Italia</span>
    </div>
    <!-- ... 5 more -->
  </div>
</div>
```

**Step 2:** CSS: dark sidebar, hover highlight, active state with red left border

**Step 3:** JS: Click on sidebar item → `map.flyTo([lat,lng], 17, {duration: 1.5})` → after flyTo completes, open the venue modal

**Step 4:** Click on map marker also highlights the sidebar item

**Step 5:** Commit `"feat: map sidebar with flyTo zoom + venue modal integration"`

---

## Phase 3: Moderator Gallery Navigation

### Task 3.1: Left/right arrows in moderator modals

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/styles.css` (arrow buttons CSS)
- Modify: `build.py` (JS — modal navigation)

**Step 1:** Add prev/next arrow buttons to each moderator modal:
```html
<button class="modal-nav modal-nav-prev" data-prev="m-mod5">‹</button>
<button class="modal-nav modal-nav-next" data-next="m-mod2">›</button>
```

**Step 2:** CSS: arrows positioned absolute left/right center, semi-transparent, hover glow

**Step 3:** JS: Click prev/next → fade out current modal (opacity 0 + translateX) → fade in target modal (opacity 1 + translateX from opposite side). Circular navigation: mod5→mod1→mod2→...→mod5

**Step 4:** Commit `"feat: moderator modal navigation with smooth transitions"`

---

## Phase 4: Incentive Section

### Task 4.1: Add incentive options from PPT

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/sections.html` (new section after convocatoria)

**Step 1:** Create incentive section with 4 options from the PPT:

| Option | Type | Description | Why for MG |
|--------|------|-------------|------------|
| 1 | Brand Experience | Invitación exclusiva a eventos MG | Refuerza conexión emocional con la marca. El participante se siente VIP, no encuestado. |
| 2 | Financial — Gift Card bencina | Beneficio tangible inmediato | Relevante para conductores. Costo visible desde el primer mensaje (convocatoria). |
| 3 | Financial — Trade-In Offer | Oferta preferencial de parte de pago | Abre conversación comercial natural. El focus se convierte en lead de venta. |
| 4 | After-sales — Voucher servicio técnico | Mantenimiento o servicio técnico | Resuelve el dolor "garantía rehén" detectado en enero. Demuestra que MG escucha. |

**Step 2:** Design as selectable cards (client picks preferred incentive in the budget configurator)

**Step 3:** Recommendation highlight: Option 2 (gift card) como incentivo base + Option 1 (experiencia) como upgrade WAV Intelligence. Argumento: "La gift card asegura asistencia. La experiencia de marca asegura lealtad."

**Step 4:** Add section about the "concurso" (contest/raffle) as engagement tool during the session

**Step 5:** Commit `"feat: incentive options section with 4 alternatives"`

---

## Phase 5: Budget Configurator

### Task 5.1: Interactive budget module

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/sections.html` (new section replacing static investment)
- Modify: `assets/styles.css` (configurator UI CSS)
- Modify: `build.py` (JS — budget state + calculations)

**Step 1:** Create a budget configurator with these categories:

**Fixed items (always included):**
- Producción base (equipo técnico, microfonía base)
- Moderador (1 por sesión)
- Transcripción + reporte bilingüe
- Coordinación y dirección WAV

**Selectable alternatives (pick one per category):**
- **Venue:** radio buttons for 6 venues (different costs)
- **Banquetería:** Desayuno / Brunch / Almuerzo (different costs)
- **Incentivo:** 4 options from Task 4.1

**Optional toggles (on/off):**
- Auto MG en venue (+$X)
- Video grabación 1 día (+$X)
- WAV Intelligence upgrade completo (+$24M)

**Step 2:** JS state management:
```js
var budget = {
  venue: 'm-v1',
  catering: 'almuerzo',
  incentive: 'giftcard',
  autoEnVenue: true,
  videoGrabacion: true,
  wavIntelligence: false
};
function recalculate() { /* sum all selected items */ }
```

**Step 3:** Live total updates as client toggles options. Show per-session and annual costs.

**Step 4:** Note: Exact prices TBD — Federico needs to update the Excel first. Use placeholder values with a `PRICES` JS object that's easy to update.

**Step 5:** Commit `"feat: interactive budget configurator"`

---

## Phase 6: Dashboard Interactivity

### Task 6.1: Make dashboard mockup interactive

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/dashboard_mockup.html`
- Modify: `assets/styles.css`
- Modify: `build.py` (JS)

**Step 1:** Add interactivity to existing mockup panels:
- Search input: typing filters/shows results with animation
- Profile filters: clicking ZS/MG4/HS shows/hides matching profiles
- Trend charts: hover shows exact values
- Timeline: clicking a keypoint scrolls the speaker card

**Step 2:** If Federico provides real data (videos, transcriptions, reports from January), integrate:
- Real verbatims in search results
- Real participant names/profiles
- Real session metrics

**Step 3:** Commit `"feat: interactive dashboard with simulated data"`

### Task 7.1: Add "Clientes potenciales" section

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/sections.html`

**Step 1:** Add new content from PPT slide 4 — the strategic opportunity to include potential clients alongside current owners:
- Brand awareness by origin
- Purchase barriers
- Competitor comparisons
- New model launch perceptions

**Step 2:** Position this as a WAV Intelligence advantage: "No solo escuchas a tus clientes — escuchas a los que aún no te compran."

**Step 3:** Commit `"feat: potential clients section from PPT strategy"`

## Phase 8: Responsive Mobile

### Task 8.1: Mobile breakpoints

**Files:**
- Modify: `assets/styles.css`

**Step 1:** Fix all sections for 375px-768px:
- Nav: hamburger menu
- Hero: smaller display font
- Grid layouts: single column
- Map: full width, sidebar collapses to bottom
- Dashboard: panels stack vertically
- Budget configurator: single column

**Step 2:** Test with Playwright at 375px width

**Step 3:** Commit `"feat: responsive mobile design"`

---

## Verification

After each phase:
1. `python3 build.py && cp output/index.html docs/index.html`
2. Playwright: navigate all sections, test interactions, take screenshots
3. `git add . && git commit && git push origin main`
4. Verify on https://wearevision.github.io/voice-of-mg/

## Dependencies / Blockers

- **Phase 5 (Budget):** Needs Federico's updated Excel with real prices before final values
- **Phase 6 (Dashboard):** Optional real data from January 2026 session (videos, transcriptions)
- Both can start with placeholder data and update later

## Priority Order

1. Phase 1 (Dark theme) — biggest visual impact, foundation for everything
2. Phase 4 (Incentives) — new content from PPT, needed for budget
3. Phase 5 (Budget configurator) — key interactive selling feature
4. Phase 2 (Map) — polish
5. Phase 3 (Moderator nav) — polish
6. Phase 6 (Dashboard) — advanced feature
7. Phase 7 (Target expansion) — content addition
8. Phase 8 (Responsive) — last, after all content is final
